news.t: VanEck Adds Consumer Staples (TRUO) and Industrials (TRUI) to TruSector ETF Suite

holdings.infoBox: TRUI is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 7.57%, GE Aerospace at 6.75%, GE Vernova at 4.95%, RTX Corporation at 4.77%, and The Boeing Company at 3.20%.

overview.description: The VanEck Industrials TruSector ETF (TRUI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund is an actively managed sector fund that is a part of a suite aiming to provide the full economic composition of the industrial sector. TRUI was launched on Jun 2, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Adds Consumer Staples (TRUO) and Industrials (TRUI) to TruSector ETF Suite
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck's adds two funds to its TruSector Suite, providing full market-cap sector exposure, closer alignment with actual market composition of sectors.
